summary: Six instances of 'rhetorical' in the ts-april-2026-update section of the Timestamp Error tab replaced with 'documentary' — the methodology.json, claim_index.json, agent_rules block, and killshot.html prose edit are real published artifacts, not just rhetorical positioning. Patches PATCH-304-E (line-1913 'rhetorical scope is now correct' instance, bundled with ISS-1087 fix) and PATCH-304-F (five other instances across the section's TLDR and body paragraphs). The Evaluation Guide tab's separate 'rhetorical framing vs quantitative evidence' instance at line 1740 is intentionally NOT changed (different context — 'rhetorical' is correctly contrasted with 'quantitative evidence' there).
